---
layout: default
title: "Rajya Sabha Bypolls and Legislative Developments in Parliament"
date: 2026-07-06T12:16:12.391451+00:00
summary: "ECI announces Rajya Sabha bypolls across multiple states as Parliament debates major electoral reforms and passes key social legislation"
run_time_ist: "5:46PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 5:46PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha Bypolls:</strong> The Election Commission has scheduled by-elections for three Rajya Sabha seats in West Bengal for July 24, with the BJP expected to strengthen its position in the Upper House.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxPZGZUOUc2cm1WLURubmNDQVNUVWpJelZvNGlBazJITzd2eEkyaWV5cUZSUlU3NWdQeHlwakJiUmJSc2xxcnFtU3lwS1Z6SnV3dkluLTBUcnVaMFNfYkRYUlFpUUxKVTJSblowWkJWdE1DSGxPbDdWVEg1XzVoY1NVVGpnNDN2X1BOUEUxa0hSSFhQbEhReEt1dTJaUGh3NUhXNERB?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Electoral Reform Setback:</strong> The Lok Sabha rejected the Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill, 2026, which sought to increase the number of parliamentary seats, after it failed to secure the required two-thirds majority.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE5NUmxlOFYxbkc2bWdTWkJmUjZYb0otV2c5VGVld2poazVEVGlRdWJjUjFmT181cFg5Nnc1VXRnZ3BWOVNjQzd2TWkxYndybkNxdnVjZGs0UmtsODlDVmpEYVMwZmVhZDJRanprU0R0bDllbW0yUm1hZ1lyXzk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial Scrutiny:</strong> The Supreme Court is set to hear a plea from the DMK alleging that Tamil Nadu ministers are influencing witnesses in the ongoing Karur stampede case.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative Milestone:</strong> Parliament has officially passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, following its approval in the Rajya Sabha today.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Diplomatic Outreach:</strong> Prime Minister Narendra Modi has arrived in Indonesia as part of a multi-nation tour to Australia and New Zealand, aimed at bolstering India&#x27;s Act East Policy.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxNdFhWNzdUSWF4MG9XejhrMFNKZGpZVktiUV9nX2pvLS10Y0ZsNFQyQnVlMDRZT2txWjQ0QUJfR29iMFNGTVNiR1BBaDR2WHA1aHZNcEgxS3BBZ1RPSGFzZEhkRmF4VHR3ek42MzBUV1ZKRVEtWmd1bjNxamJzMkNCcjc3aWJYZVFoc1JlZG5jb2pBV3MtbmZzWEJRWER4OER1SzVmb0tHdlVLT1JsaGFmZW9n?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a></span></li>
</ul>

</article>
